column1: # Cutoff-band Haiku MEMBERSHIP rescores (UnifyWeaver μ-cosine, stream V / README Prompt C).
# Directional membership: "Is <category> a sub-topic/subfield OF physics? 0..1" (1=core physics,
# 0=unrelated) — NOT relatedness. Scored by an inline Haiku subagent over the e5-prior decision
# band μ∈[0.2,0.45] around the 0.3 gate (the only nodes a rescore could flip in/out). These are
# the expensive, bought-once boundary labels; they feed stream T (training) and the geometric-mean
# (The named Music≈0.52/Politics≈0.50 sit just above the 0.45 band ceiling — a documented residual,
#  see README "Progress — stream V"; not in this fixture.)
# Order: e5-prior μ descending. Format: name<TAB>μ. '#' lines are comments.
